input: WITH doc_edges AS (SELECT s.__id as source_id, COUNT(*) as edge_cnt FROM edges e JOIN objects s ON e.source_id = s.__global_id GROUP BY s.__id), obj_info AS (SELECT __id, __kind FROM objects WHERE __kind IN ('__Document', 'Feature')) SELECT oi.__id, oi.__kind, COALESCE(de.edge_cnt, 0) as refs FROM obj_info oi LEFT JOIN doc_edges de ON oi.__id = de.source_id ORDER BY oi.__id
expected: WITH doc_edges AS (SELECT s.__id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS edge_cnt FROM edges e INNER JOIN objects s ON e.source_id = s.__global_id AND s.__workspace = 'ws2' WHERE e.__workspace = 'ws2' GROUP BY s.__id), obj_info AS (SELECT __id, __kind FROM objects WHERE __kind IN ('__Document', 'Feature') AND __workspace = 'ws2') SELECT oi.__id, oi.__kind, COALESCE(de.edge_cnt, 0) AS refs FROM obj_info oi LEFT JOIN doc_edges de ON oi.__id = de.source_id ORDER BY oi.__id ASC
